title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
